title: Scientists identify giant ‘T-Rex of the sea’ which ruled ancient oceans 80 million years ago
description: Researchers say the newly identified Tylosaurus rex was one of the largest and most dangerous marine predators of the Cretaceous Period.

title: Clean energy saved EU €51 billion in 2025 by cutting fossil fuel imports - as solar leads the way
description: Investing in renewables has also ensured greater energy security at a moment when the war on Iran is destabilising supplies and forcing up costs.

title: A day on Earth is described as 24 hours, but the planet has been slowing down for billions of years — and growth rings in ancient coral fossils show that 380 million years ago, hundreds of millions of years before any dinosaur existed, an Earth day was only ab - Space Daily
description: A day on Earth is described as 24 hours, but the planet has been slowing down for billions of years — and growth rings in ancient coral fossils show that 380 million years ago, hundreds of millions of years before any dinosaur existed, an Earth day was only ab Space Daily Something ‘unprecedented’ is now happening to Earth’s rotation, scientists say BBC Science Focus Magazine A Day on Earth Is Getting Longer as the Planet’s Rotation Slows WSJ The Earth spins ever more slowly: what science says about future 25-hour days Demócrata Scientists Say Climate Change Is Making Earth's Days Longer Than Before NDTV
